description: You are an Industrial Engineer at an automotive components manufacturer. Following a lean manufacturing assessment on the brake pad production line, create a 2-page Value Stream Map (VSM) in Wondershare EdrawMax with a professional theme. Document the current state on the first page, including supplier and customer icons, a central production control box with information flow, and four sequential process boxes (Raw Material Stamping, Welding, Surface Treatment, Final Assembly & QC) with data boxes for cycle time, changeover time, uptime, and operators. The current state map must also include inventory triangles, push arrows, and a timeline bar showing value-added and non-value-added time. On the second page, illustrate future state improvements using pull/kanban systems, kaizen bursts, and a summary box detailing the top three improvements and their impact. Save the completed diagram to /home/ga/vsm_current_future.eddx.
